J-14.last_evidence_path: iter-7 MOST-AT-RISK RE-CONFIRMED GREEN: SCREEN cheap-no-WF / PROMOTE k<n_screened on stronger model + WF / best-from-promoted-only mechanics UNCHANGED. promote_k only governs HOW MANY already-screened in-seed candidates promote (bounded 1-3, default 1). test_promote_k_two_promotes_two_of_three confirms promote_k=2 promotes 2 of 3 screened (k<n_screened held). 27-test re-run + 4 promote_k route tests green.

J-16.name: Robust objective gates overfit
J-16.last_evidence_path: iter-7 DATA/ENDPOINT LAYER PROVEN + PERSISTED, PIXEL LAYER NOT OBTAINED (the SOLE remaining gate to GOAL_ACHIEVED). PROVEN: DoD-0 persistence satisfied (git diff --stat HEAD -- apps/ non-empty incl. backend auto_session.py +106 / auto_session_routes.py +14, NEW FE AutoSessionLeaderboard.tsx, FE types sessionApi.ts +21, IterationPanel.tsx wiring, NEW test_auto_session_leaderboard.py; status.json 8 changed_files + tests_run:true + current_step:qa_complete; handoff Files-Changed == diff). 12 J-16 hermetic tests pass (evaluator re-run) incl. the BINDING overfit-gating test_overfit_gating_higher_return_wfe_fail_not_best (candidate A higher-return+wfe<0.3 -> eligible:false, gatingReason cites WFE, NOT best; bestIterationId==B the WFE-passing lower-return cand) + over-leveraged variant + canonical-score (== RobustScorer.score, no new construction) + no-eager-parse + persistence/reload + no-secrets + best==bestIterationId. Live TC-14 on :8691: served autoRun.leaderboard deduped rows, keys exactly [eligible,gatingReason,iterationId,robustScore,stage] (no duplicated metric), best WFE-gated == bestIterationId. FE component is real (147 lines, reads entry.robustScore verbatim, joins display metrics from iterationHistory, no recompute, returns null when empty); tsc+vite+eslint clean. Coherence COHERENCE-PASS. NOT OBTAINED (LOAD-BEARING per spec — 'a 5th endpoint-only substitute is NOT acceptable; do NOT carry a 6th pixel-debt deferral'): the leaderboard ROWS were never rendered/pixel-captured. browser-qa-agent SKIPPED all 10 tests (probed dead :3692 instead of the actual offset :3691 — the recurring harness port-probe root cause, UNFIXED). QA TC-13 BLOCKED by the documented Chrome-MCP hidden-tab render throttle (visibilityState permanently 'hidden' -> React 18 scheduler + useBacktest poll timers never sustain a data-loaded frame); only an EMPTY full-app frame (034-navigate.png) was captured, not the leaderboard. QA report itself states it 'must be genuinely closed in a foreground browser before J-16/GOAL_ACHIEVED is declared.' => J-16 is PARTIAL (data done, pixel pending), NOT passing => no GOAL_ACHIEVED this iter.

observations.note: PIXEL PROOF FOR J-16 NOT OBTAINED — and it is LOAD-BEARING (spec DoD-1: 'BOTH layers required; endpoint-only does NOT close a new render path'; iter-6 lesson: 'a 5th endpoint-only substitute is NOT acceptable'; spec NOTES: 'Do NOT carry a 6th pixel-debt deferral'). This is now the SINGLE remaining gate to GOAL_ACHIEVED — every other layer of J-16 (data, endpoint, persistence, coherence, anti-goals, FE build/lint) is green. TWO failures compounded: (1) browser-qa-agent probed the WRONG port (dead :3692; ./scripts/dev.sh binds :3691) and SKIPPED all 10 tests — the recurring browser-qa-phase.sh :3000/offset-port health-probe root cause was NOT fixed despite the dev handoff documenting the exact CHAIN_FRONTEND_PORT=3691/CHAIN_BACKEND_PORT=8691 export; (2) the QA agent's own attempt hit the documented Chrome-MCP hidden-tab render throttle in a contended environment and could capture only an empty full-app frame, never the leaderboard rows. NEXT ITER MUST FIX THE ROOT CAUSE, not retry the broken probe: either patch browser-qa-phase.sh port detection to the deterministic offset (base + sha1(repo)%1000 = :3691/:8691) with health re-probing across the whole window, OR run a genuine foreground/uncontended browser window. A 7th consecutive pixel miss on the SAME unfixed harness bug would convert this from a verification gap into a process STALL.
observations.evidence: reports/phase-goal-financial_free-iter-7-ui-test-results.md (browser-qa SKIPPED, 0/10, probed :3692); reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-7-qa.md (TC-13 BLOCKED — hidden-tab throttle, only 034-navigate.png empty frame; 'must be closed in a foreground browser before GOAL_ACHIEVED'); docs/handoffs/goal-financial_free-iter-7-dev.md (Browser-QA section documents the :3691/:8691 port fix that was not applied)

observations.note: DoD-0 PERSISTENCE GATE (the iter-5 lost-work lesson) RE-APPLIED AND SATISFIED for J-16 — now FE-inclusive. Independently re-verified against the live tree by the evaluator: git diff --stat HEAD -- apps/ = 6 modified + 2 NEW untracked files (apps/frontend/src/components/AutoSessionLeaderboard.tsx + apps/backend/tests/test_auto_session_leaderboard.py present on disk); status.json changed_files (8) + tests_run:true; handoff Files-Changed == git diff --name-only + the 2 new files. A green pytest cache is no longer the only evidence — the code is genuinely in the working tree. This gate has now caught/prevented the iter-5 failure mode for two consecutive iterations; keep applying it.

Any walk-forward-dependent LIVE QA MUST use a date range >= IS_months + OOS_months (>=9mo at the 6/3 defaults), or PROMOTE walk-forward forms 0 windows -> wfe 0.0 -> best=None (correct gated outcome, but the promote->best/leaderboard demo is silently vacuous). iter-7 dev DID follow this (live run 2023-01-01->2023-12-01, 11mo) and got a real 3-row leaderboard with WFE-gated best — but that real run happened to have all candidates PASS the WFE gate, so it did not by chance show a REJECTED overfit candidate; the deterministic hermetic test_overfit_gating_higher_return_wfe_fail_not_best (promote_k=2) is the binding proof of rejection. APPLIES to any iter-8 live pixel run: use promote_k:2 + >=9mo AND construct/seek a WFE-failing candidate to make the rejection visible in pixels.
